data.title: Wall Street’s one-day loss tops the entire crypto market cap
data.description:
The United States stock market lost more in value over the April 4 trading day than the entire cryptocurrency market is worth, as fears over US President Donald Trump's tariffs continue to ramp up. On April 4, the US stock market lost $3. 25 trillion — around $570 billion more than the entire crypto market's $2. 68 trillion valuation at the time of publication
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/united-states-stock-market-decline-market-cap-crypto-wall-street?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts Market Challenges for New Generation of Investors
data.description:
According to PANews, Arthur Hayes recently tweeted that the latest generation of U.S. stock investors has become too accustomed to a structurally upward bull market. He suggests that this is more of an exception than a global norm, citing numerous examples where stock markets have experienced a decade of sideways or range-bound movements despite strong underlying economic growth.

Hayes anticipates that the market will create an ideal environment for traders who can quickly adapt and thrive. However, he warns that the outlook will be extremely pessimistic for many private-oriented strategies. If U.S. President Donald Trump continues with his policy choices, Hayes predicts that expected returns for private equity and venture capital will significantly decline.

data.title: Milei bows to Trump’s tariff pressure, vows legislative changes to protect Argentine exports
data.description:
Argentine President Javier Milei promises to change legislation to guard Argentine exports from President Donald Trump’s new tariffs.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/milei-bows-to-trumps-tariff-pressure/

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based AMP perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based AMP perpetual contract with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: The Coinbase page shows that the current price of WLFI is $0 and trading is not yet open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Coinbase page, as of 13:25 on April 5, 2025, @worldlibertyfi (WLFI) cannot be traded on the Coinbase platform, and its USD exchange rate is displayed as 0 USD. The platform prompts that the data comes from a third party and its accuracy cannot be guaranteed.

data.description:
1. Sui Lianchuang responded to Paradigm CTO: Solidity and EVM have been considered problematic since 2018

5. The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad": The current market crash has arrived, and it is recommended to invest in Bitcoin, gold and silver

7. Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$2.0627 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net outflow
8. Justin Sun: Resolutely hold FDT accountable for fraud

data.title: Ave.ai Chain Ecosystem Carnival officially opens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 5, Ave.ai's first on-chain ecological carnival was officially launched in Hong Kong. Ave.ai joined hands with BNB Chain, TON, Sui, Bitget wallet, Kucoin, Token Pocket, 1inch, SunPump, Storm and other 20+ heavyweight guests in the industry to gather at the scene.
The conference invited many well-known guests to give speeches, and the topics included on-chain transactions, user experience, ecological construction, the survival status of P players and on-chain tools. The event set up airdrop benefits and peripheral gifts throughout the event, inviting Web3 users to focus on the new ecological landscape of on-chain ecological innovation.

data.title: Binance Data Reveals Surprising Bitcoin Trading Patterns—Here’s What Traders Are Doing
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price trajectory has continued to show considerable instability. After briefly climbing past the $87,000 mark earlier this week, the cryptocurrency experienced a significant pullback, declining to $81,332 earlier today. As of the latest data, Bitcoin is trading at around $82,600, reflecting a weekly decrease of about 7. 6%
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/binance-data-reveals-surprising-bitcoin-trading-patterns-heres-what-traders-are-doing/
